section.fr: Tableau de Localisation des Coups (Hit Locations) (Lancez 7-7 : Localisations des Coups (Hit Locations))
TABLE 7-21 : EFFETS CRITIQUES EXPLOSIFS - CORPS (EXPLOSIVE CRITICAL EFFECTS - BODY)

entries_en.result: Target blown backwards 1d5 metres, takes 1 level of Fatigue per metre travelled. Prone.
Target blown backwards 1d10 metres, takes 1 level of Fatigue per metre travelled. Additional levels of Fatigue.
Target blown 1d10 metres, takes 2 levels of Fatigue per metre travelled.
Explosion sends target sprawling. Takes 1d5 levels of Fatigue, Stunned for 1 Round, must spend a Full Action to regain feet.
Concussion stuns for 1 Round, takes 1d10 levels of Fatigue.
Chunks of target's flesh ripped free. Stunned for 1 Round, takes 1d10 levels of Fatigue.
Target is Stunned for 1d10 Rounds, takes 1d10 levels of Fatigue. Can only take Half Actions for the next 1d10 hours.
Target's chest explodes outward, killing them instantly.
Pieces of target's body fly in all directions. Damage to anyone within 1d10 metres.
Damage to anyone within 1d10 metres. Detonate on the target's person.

entries_fr.result: La cible est projetée en arrière de 1d5 mètres, subit 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue) par mètre parcouru. À terre (Prone).
La cible est projetée en arrière de 1d10 mètres, subit 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue) par mètre parcouru. Niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) supplémentaires.
La cible est projetée de 1d10 mètres, subit 2 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) par mètre parcouru.
L'explosion envoie la cible s'étaler. Subit 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue), Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1 Round, doit dépenser une Action Complète (Full Action) pour se remettre sur pied.
La commotion étourdit pendant 1 Round, subit 1d10 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).
Des morceaux de chair de la cible sont arrachés. Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1 Round, subit 1d10 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).
La cible est Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1d10 Rounds, subit 1d10 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue). Ne peut effectuer que des Demi-Actions (Half Actions) pendant les prochaines 1d10 heures.
La poitrine de la cible explose vers l'extérieur, la tuant instantanément.
Des morceaux du corps de la cible volent dans toutes les directions. Dommage (Damage) à quiconque se trouve à moins de 1d10 mètres.
Dommage (Damage) à quiconque se trouve à moins de 1d10 mètres. Détonation sur la personne de la cible.

section.fr: TABLE 7-22 : EFFETS CRITIQUES EXPLOSIFS - JAMBE (EXPLOSIVE CRITICAL EFFECTS - LEG)

entries_en.result: Glancing blast sends the character backwards one metre.
Force of the explosion takes the target's feet out from under him. Prone and takes 1 level of Fatigue.
Concussion cracks the target's leg, leaving him Stunned for 1 Round and halving all movement for 1d5 Rounds.

The explosion sends the target spinning through the air. The target travels 1d5 metres away from the explosion and takes 1 level of Fatigue per metre travelled. Takes the target a Full Action to regain his feet and he halves all movement for 1d10 Rounds.

Explosive force removes part of the target's foot and scatters it over a wide area. The target must make an immediate Toughness Test or permanently halves the loss of his foot, inflicting 1d5 levels of Fatigue. On a success, the target takes 1d5 levels of Fatigue and halves their movement until he receives medical attention.

Concussive force of the blast shatters the target's leg bones and splits apart his flesh, inflicting 1d10 levels of fatigue. The leg is broken and, until repaired, the target counts as having only one leg.

The explosion reduces the target's leg into a hunk of smoking meat. The target must immediately make a Toughness Test or die from shock. If a successful Test, the target is still Stunned for 1d10 Rounds, takes 1d10 levels of Fatigue and suffers Blood Loss. He now has only one leg.
The blast tears the leg from the body in a geyser of gore, sending him crashing to the ground, blood pumping from the ragged stump: instantly fatal.

The leg explodes in an eruption of blood, killing the target immediately and sending tiny fragments of bone whistling and splinter hurting off in all directions. Anyone within two metres of the target takes 1d10+2 Impact Damage.

As above, except in addition, if the target is carrying any ammunition, it explodes dealing 1d10+5 Damage to anyone within 1d10 metres. If the target is carrying any grenades or missiles, these too detonate on the target's person.

entries_fr.result: L'explosion rasante envoie le personnage en arrière d'un mètre.
La force de l'explosion fait perdre l'équilibre à la cible. À terre (Prone) et subit 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue).
La commotion fissure la jambe de la cible, la laissant Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1 Round et réduisant de moitié tous les mouvements pendant 1d5 Rounds.

L'explosion envoie la cible tournoyer dans les airs. La cible se déplace de 1d5 mètres de l'explosion et subit 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue) par mètre parcouru. La cible met une Action Complète (Full Action) pour se remettre sur pied et réduit de moitié tous les mouvements pendant 1d10 Rounds.

La force explosive enlève une partie du pied de la cible et la disperse sur une vaste zone. La cible doit effectuer immédiatement un Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou réduit définitivement la perte de son pied de moitié, infligeant 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue). En cas de succès, la cible subit 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) et réduit de moitié son mouvement jusqu'à ce qu'elle reçoive des soins médicaux.

La force de commotion de l'explosion brise les os de la jambe de la cible et sépare sa chair, infligeant 1d10 niveaux de fatigue. La jambe est cassée et, jusqu'à sa réparation, la cible est considérée comme n'ayant qu'une seule jambe.

L'explosion réduit la jambe de la cible en un morceau de viande fumante. La cible doit immédiatement effectuer un Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou mourir de choc. En cas de succès au Test (Test), la cible est toujours Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1d10 Rounds, subit 1d10 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) et souffre de Perte de Sang (Blood Loss). Elle n'a plus qu'une seule jambe.
L'explosion arrache la jambe du corps dans un geyser de sang, l'envoyant s'écraser au sol, le sang jaillissant du moignon déchiqueté : instantanément fatal.

La jambe explose dans une éruption de sang, tuant la cible immédiatement et envoyant de minuscules fragments d'os siffler et se briser dans toutes les directions. Quiconque se trouve à moins de deux mètres de la cible subit 1d10+2 de Dommage d'Impact (Impact Damage).

Comme ci-dessus, sauf qu'en plus, si la cible transporte des munitions, elles explosent, infligeant 1d10+5 de Dommage (Damage) à quiconque se trouve à moins de 1d10 mètres. Si la cible transporte des grenades ou des missiles, ceux-ci explosent également sur la personne de la cible.

section.fr: TABLE 7-23 : EFFETS CRITIQUES LACÉRANTS - TÊTE (RENDING CRITICAL EFFECTS - HEAD)

entries_en.result: The attack tears skin from the target's face dealing 1 level of Fatigue.

The attack slices open the target's scalp which immediately begins to bleed profusely. Due to blood pouring into the target's eyes, he suffers a -10 penalty to both Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill for the next 1d10 Turns. The target takes 1 level of Fatigue.
The attack tears the target's helmet from his head. If wearing no helmet, the target loses an ear instead and inflicts 2 levels of Fatigue.
The attack scoops out one of the target's eyes, inflicting 1d5 levels of Fatigue and leaving the target Stunned for 1 Round.
The attack opens up the target's face, leaving him Stunned for 1d5 Rounds and inflicting 1d5 levels of Fatigue.

As the blade rips violently across the target's face, it takes with it an important feature. Roll 1d10 to see what the target has lost: 1-3: Eye (see Permanent Effects on page 201), 4-7: Nose (permanently halve Fellowship), 8-10: Ear (permanently reduce Fellowship by 1d10; you can always hide the wound with your hat).

In a splatter of skin and teeth, the attack removes most of the target's face. He is permanently blinded and has his Fellowship permanently reduced to 1d10 and is now barely capable of speaking without slurring his words. In addition, the target is suffering from Blood Loss and takes 1d10 levels of Fatigue.
The blow slices into the side of the target's head causing his eyes to pop out and his brain to ooze down his cheek, a jellied, pulpy, mess. Dead before he hits the ground.

With a sound not unlike a wet sponge being torn in half, the target's head flies free of its body and sails through the air, landing harmlessly 2d10 metres away with a soggy thud. The target is instantly slain.

As above, except the target's neck spews blood in a torrent, drenching all those nearby and forcing them to take an Agility Test. Anyone who fails the Test, suffers a -10 penalty to his Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill Tests for 1 Round as gore fills his eyes or fouls his visor.

entries_fr.result: L'attaque arrache la peau du visage de la cible, infligeant 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue).

L'attaque ouvre le cuir chevelu de la cible qui commence immédiatement à saigner abondamment. En raison du sang qui coule dans les yeux de la cible, elle subit une pénalité de -10 à la fois à la Compétence d'Arme (Weapon Skill) et à la Compétence Balistique (Ballistic Skill) pour les prochains 1d10 Tours. La cible subit 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue).
L'attaque arrache le casque de la tête de la cible. Si elle ne porte pas de casque, la cible perd une oreille à la place et inflige 2 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).
L'attaque arrache l'un des yeux de la cible, infligeant 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) et laissant la cible Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1 Round.
L'attaque ouvre le visage de la cible, la laissant Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1d5 Rounds et infligeant 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).

Alors que la lame déchire violemment le visage de la cible, elle emporte avec elle une caractéristique importante. Lancez 1d10 pour voir ce que la cible a perdu : 1-3 : Œil (voir Effets Permanents à la page 201), 4-7 : Nez (réduit définitivement la Sociabilité (Fellowship) de moitié), 8-10 : Oreille (réduit définitivement la Sociabilité (Fellowship) de 1d10 ; vous pouvez toujours cacher la blessure avec votre chapeau).

Dans un giclement de peau et de dents, l'attaque enlève la majeure partie du visage de la cible. Elle est définitivement aveuglée et sa Sociabilité (Fellowship) est définitivement réduite à 1d10 et elle est maintenant à peine capable de parler sans bafouiller. De plus, la cible souffre de Perte de Sang (Blood Loss) et subit 1d10 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).
Le coup tranche le côté de la tête de la cible, faisant sortir ses yeux et couler son cerveau le long de sa joue, une masse gélifiée et pulpeuse. Mort avant de toucher le sol.

Avec un son qui n'est pas sans rappeler une éponge mouillée déchirée en deux, la tête de la cible s'envole de son corps et vole dans les airs, atterrissant inoffensivement à 2d10 mètres avec un bruit sourd et humide. La cible est instantanément tuée.

Comme ci-dessus, sauf que le cou de la cible crache du sang en un torrent, trempant tous ceux qui se trouvent à proximité et les forçant à effectuer un Test d'Agilité (Agility Test). Quiconque échoue au Test (Test), subit une pénalité de -10 à ses Tests de Compétence d'Arme (Weapon Skill) et de Compétence Balistique (Ballistic Skill) pendant 1 Round, car du sang remplit ses yeux ou encrasse sa visière.

section.fr: TABLE 7-24 : EFFETS CRITIQUES LACÉRANTS - BRAS (RENDING CRITICAL EFFECTS - ARM)

entries_en.result: The slashing attack tears anything free that was held in this arm.
Deep cuts cause the target to drop whatever was held and inflicts 1 level of Fatigue.
The shredding attack sends the limb screaming in pain. He takes 2 levels of Fatigue and drops whatever was held in that hand.

The attack flays the skin from the limb, filling the air with blood and the sounds of his screaming. The target falls prone from the agony and takes 2 levels of Fatigue. The limb is useless for 1d10 Rounds.

A bloody and very painful looking furrow is opened up in the target's arm. The target takes 1d5 levels of Fatigue and vomits all over the place in agony. He drops whatever was held and the limb is useless until medical attention is received. The target also suffers Blood Loss.

The blow mangles flesh and muscle as it hacks into the target's hand, liberating 1d5 fingers in the process (the roll of 5 means that the thumb has been sheared off). The target takes 3 levels of Fatigue and must immediately make a Toughness Test or lose the use of his hand.

The attack slices apart skin, muscle, and sinew, even severing the target's arm into a dangling ruin, inflicting 1d5 levels of Fatigue. The arm is broken and, until repaired, the target counts as having only one arm. In addition, numerous veins have been severed and the target is now suffering from Blood Loss.

With an assortment of unnaturally wet ripping sounds, the arm flies free of the less trailing blood behind it in a crimson arc. The target must immediately make a Toughness Test or die from shock if he passes the Test, he is Stunned for 1d10 Turns and suffers Blood Loss. He also takes 1d10 levels of Fatigue and now has only one arm.
The attack slices clean through the arm and into the torso, drenching the ground in blood and gore and killing the target instantly.

As above. However, as the arm falls to the ground its fingers spasm uncontrollably, pumping the trigger of any held weapon. If the target was carrying a ranged weapon there is a 5% chance that a single randomly determined target within 2d10 metres will be hit by these shots, in which case resolve a single hit from the target's weapon as normal.

entries_fr.result: L'attaque tranchante arrache tout ce qui était tenu dans ce bras.
Des coupures profondes font tomber à la cible tout ce qui était tenu et infligent 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue).
L'attaque déchiquetante envoie le membre hurler de douleur. Il subit 2 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) et laisse tomber tout ce qui était tenu dans cette main.

L'attaque écorche la peau du membre, remplissant l'air de sang et des sons de ses cris. La cible tombe à terre à cause de l'agonie et subit 2 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue). Le membre est inutile pendant 1d10 Rounds.

Un sillon sanglant et d'apparence très douloureuse est ouvert dans le bras de la cible. La cible subit 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) et vomit partout dans l'agonie. Elle laisse tomber tout ce qui était tenu et le membre est inutile jusqu'à ce que des soins médicaux soient reçus. La cible souffre également de Perte de Sang (Blood Loss).

Le coup mutile la chair et les muscles alors qu'il entaille la main de la cible, libérant 1d5 doigts dans le processus (le résultat de 5 signifie que le pouce a été cisaillé). La cible subit 3 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) et doit immédiatement effectuer un Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou perdre l'usage de sa main.

L'attaque tranche la peau, les muscles et les tendons, sectionnant même le bras de la cible en une ruine pendante, infligeant 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue). Le bras est cassé et, jusqu'à sa réparation, la cible est considérée comme n'ayant qu'un seul bras. De plus, de nombreuses veines ont été sectionnées et la cible souffre maintenant de Perte de Sang (Blood Loss).

Avec un assortiment de sons de déchirure anormalement humides, le bras s'envole du moins en traînant du sang derrière lui dans un arc cramoisi. La cible doit immédiatement effectuer un Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou mourir de choc si elle réussit le Test (Test), elle est Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1d10 Tours et souffre de Perte de Sang (Blood Loss). Elle subit également 1d10 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) et n'a plus qu'un seul bras.
L'attaque tranche proprement le bras et dans le torse, trempant le sol de sang et de tripes et tuant la cible instantanément.

Comme ci-dessus. Cependant, alors que le bras tombe au sol, ses doigts se contractent de façon incontrôlable, actionnant la gâchette de toute arme tenue. Si la cible portait une arme à distance, il y a 5 % de chances qu'une seule cible déterminée au hasard à moins de 2d10 mètres soit touchée par ces tirs, auquel cas résolvez un seul coup de l'arme de la cible comme d'habitude.

section.fr: Table 7-13 : Effets Critiques d'Énergie - Corps (Energy Critical Effects - Body)

entries_en.result: Steals breath, 1 level of Fatigue, half action next turn.
Flesh chars, 2 levels of Fatigue, Stunned 1 Round.
Knocks to ground, Agility Test or catch fire.

1d5 levels of Fatigue, Stand Action to regain feet. Struck by full force of attack, sent reeling to the ground, smoke spiraling out of the wound. The target is knocked to the ground, Stunned for 1d10 Rounds, and takes 1d5 levels of Fatigue. In addition, he must make an Agility Test to catch fire (see Special Damage on page 210).
Intense power cooks target's organs, burns lungs and heart with intense heat. Target is Stunned for 2d10 Rounds and reduces his Toughness by half (round down).

Skin turns black and peels off while body fat seeps out of his clothing and armor. The target is Stunned for 2d10 Rounds. The attack halves his Strength, Toughness and Agility. The extensive scarring permanently halves the target's Fellowship characteristics.
Completely encased in fire, melting skin and popping eyes like superheated eggs. He falls to the ground a blackened corpse.

As above, in addition, if the target is carrying any ammunition, there is a 50% chance it explodes. Unless they can make a successful Dodge Test, all creatures within 1d5 metres take 1d10+5 Explosive Damage. If the target carried any grenades or missiles, one round after the Damage was dealt they detonate where the target's body lies with the normal effects.

entries_fr.result: Coupe le souffle, 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue), demi-action au prochain tour.
Donne des coups dans le vide, 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue).
La chair se carbonise, 2 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue), Étourdi (Stunned) pendant 1 Round.
Renverse au sol, Test d'Agilité (Agility Test) ou prend feu.

1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue), Action Debout (Stand Action) pour se remettre sur pied. Frappé par la pleine force de l'attaque, envoyé au sol en titubant, de la fumée s'échappant de la blessure. La cible est renversée au sol, Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1d10 Rounds, et subit 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue). De plus, elle doit effectuer un Test d'Agilité (Agility Test) pour prendre feu (voir Dommage Spécial à la page 210).

Une puissance intense cuit les organes de la cible, brûle les poumons et le cœur avec une chaleur intense. La cible est Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 2d10 Rounds et réduit son Endurance (Toughness) de moitié (arrondi à l'inférieur).

La peau devient noire et se détache tandis que la graisse corporelle s'infiltre hors de ses vêtements et de son armure. La cible est Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 2d10 Rounds. L'attaque réduit de moitié sa Force (Strength), son Endurance (Toughness) et son Agilité (Agility). Les cicatrices importantes réduisent de moitié de façon permanente la caractéristique de Sociabilité (Fellowship) de la cible.
Complètement enveloppé de feu, la peau fond et les yeux éclatent comme des œufs surchauffés. Il tombe au sol, un cadavre noirci.

Comme ci-dessus, de plus, si la cible transporte des munitions, il y a 50 % de chances qu'elles explosent. À moins qu'ils ne réussissent un Test d'Esquive (Dodge Test), toutes les créatures situées à moins de 1d5 mètres subissent 1d10+5 de Dommage Explosif (Explosive Damage). Si la cible transportait des grenades ou des missiles, un round après que le Dommage (Damage) a été infligé, ils explosent là où se trouve le corps de la cible avec les effets normaux.

section.fr: Table 7-14 : Effets Critiques d'Énergie - Jambe (Energy Critical Effects - Leg)

entries_en.result: Strikes against leg, halves movement for 1 Round.
Breaks leg, Stunned for 1 Round, halves movement for 1d5 Rounds.
Solid blow, sends currents of agony, halves movement for 1d5 Rounds.
Endures horrific burn Damage, fusing clothing and armor with flesh and bone. 1 level of Fatigue, moves at half speed for 2d10 Rounds.

Burns target's foot, charring flesh and emitting foul aroma. Successfully Test Toughness or lose the foot. On a success, target's movement rates are halved until he receives medical attention. In addition, the target takes 2 levels of Fatigue.

Energy attack fries the leg, leaving a mess of blackened flesh. The leg is broken and until repaired, the target counts as having lost the leg. The target must take a Toughness Test or become Stunned for 1 Round. In addition the target gains 1d5 levels of Fatigue. The target now only has one leg.

Energy scars through the bone, causing the leg to be severed. The target must take a Toughness Test or become Stunned for 1 Round. In addition the target gains 1d10 levels of Fatigue and is suffering from Blood Loss. The target now only has one leg.
Force of the attack reduces the leg to little more than a chunk of sizzling gristle. The target must Test Toughness or die from shock. The leg is utterly lost.
In a terrifying display of power, the leg immolates and fire consumes the target completely. The target dies in a matter of agonising seconds

entries_fr.result: Frappe contre la jambe, réduit de moitié le mouvement pendant 1 Round.
Casse la jambe, Étourdi (Stunned) pendant 1 Round, réduit de moitié le mouvement pendant 1d5 Rounds.
Coup solide, envoie des courants d'agonie, réduit de moitié le mouvement pendant 1d5 Rounds.
Subit un horrible Dommage (Damage) de brûlure, fusionnant les vêtements et l'armure avec la chair et les os. 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue), se déplace à moitié vitesse pendant 2d10 Rounds.

Brûle le pied de la cible, carbonisant la chair et émettant un arôme fétide. Réussit un Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou perd le pied. En cas de succès, les vitesses de déplacement de la cible sont réduites de moitié jusqu'à ce qu'elle reçoive des soins médicaux. De plus, la cible subit 2 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).

L'attaque énergétique frit la jambe, laissant un gâchis de chair noircie. La jambe est cassée et, jusqu'à sa réparation, la cible est considérée comme ayant perdu la jambe. La cible doit effectuer un Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou être Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1 Round. De plus, la cible gagne 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue). La cible n'a plus qu'une seule jambe.

L'énergie marque l'os, provoquant la section de la jambe. La cible doit effectuer un Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou être Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1 Round. De plus, la cible gagne 1d10 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue) et souffre de Perte de Sang (Blood Loss). La cible n'a plus qu'une seule jambe.
La force de l'attaque réduit la jambe à un simple morceau de cartilage grésillant. La cible doit effectuer un Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou mourir de choc. La jambe est complètement perdue.
Dans une terrifiante démonstration de puissance, la jambe s'immole et le feu consume complètement la cible. La cible meurt en quelques secondes d'agonie.

section.fr: Table 7-15 : Effets Critiques d'Impact - Tête (Impact Critical Effects - Head)

entries_en.result: Fills head with ringing noise. Test Toughness or 1 level of Fatigue.
Causes stars. Takes 1 level of Fatigue, -10 penalty to Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill Tests for 1 Round.
Nose explodes, blinding for 1 Round, 2 levels of Fatigue.
Concussive strike staggers target, dealing 1d5 levels of Fatigue.
Force sends target reeling in pain. Stunned for 1 Round.
Head snapped back, leaving him staggering around trying to control mind-numbing pain. Target is Stunned for 1d5 Rounds, 2 levels of Fatigue.
Attack slams into target's head, fracturing the skull and opening a long tear in his scalp. Target is Stunned for 1d10 Rounds, halves all movement for 1d10 hours.
Blood pours from nose, mouth, eyes, skull pulverises.
Head bursts, sprays blood, brains. Anyone within 4 metres must make Agility Test or suffer -10 penalty to WS and BS on next Turn as gore gets in their eyes or on their visors.

As above, so powerful it passes through target, may hit another target nearby. If hit was from a melee weapon, attacker may immediately make another attack (with the same weapon) against any other target they can reach without moving. If the hit was from a ranged weapon they may immediately make another attack (with the same weapon) against any target standing directly behind the original target and still within range of their weapon.

entries_fr.result: Remplit la tête d'un bruit de sonnerie. Test d'Endurance (Toughness Test) ou 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue).
Provoque des étoiles. Subit 1 niveau de Fatigue (Fatigue), pénalité de -10 aux Tests de Compétence d'Arme (Weapon Skill) et de Compétence Balistique (Ballistic Skill) pendant 1 Round.
Le nez explose, aveuglant pendant 1 Round, 2 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).
Un coup de force étourdit la cible, infligeant 1d5 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).
La force envoie la cible tituber de douleur. Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1 Round.
La tête est projetée en arrière, la laissant tituber en essayant de contrôler une douleur abrutissante. La cible est Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1d5 Rounds, 2 niveaux de Fatigue (Fatigue).

L'attaque frappe la tête de la cible, fracturant le crâne et ouvrant une longue déchirure dans son cuir chevelu. La cible est Étourdie (Stunned) pendant 1d10 Rounds, réduit de moitié tous les mouvements pendant 1d10 heures.
Le sang coule du nez, de la bouche, des yeux, le crâne se pulvérise.

La tête éclate, projette du sang, du cerveau. Quiconque se trouve à moins de 4 mètres doit effectuer un Test d'Agilité (Agility Test) ou subir une pénalité de -10 aux Tests de WS et BS au prochain Tour, car du sang gicle dans ses yeux ou sur ses visières.

Comme ci-dessus, si puissant qu'il traverse la cible, peut toucher une autre cible à proximité. Si le coup provenait d'une arme de mêlée, l'attaquant peut immédiatement effectuer une autre attaque (avec la même arme) contre toute autre cible qu'il peut atteindre sans bouger. Si le coup provenait d'une arme à distance, il peut immédiatement effectuer une autre attaque (avec la même arme) contre toute cible se tenant directement derrière la cible initiale et toujours à portée de son arme.

section.fr: Table 7-16 : Effets Critiques d'Impact - Bras (Impact Critical Effects - Arm)

entries_en.result: Inflicts crushing pain, 1 level of Fatigue, drops held item.
Reeling from pain. Stunned for 1 Round. Arm is useless for 1d10 Rounds, 1 level of Fatigue.
Muscle and bone pound into arm. WS and BS are both halved (round down) for 1d10 Rounds. 1 level of Fatigue, Agility Test or drop anything held.

entries_en.result: Balance. Your alignment changes to a radically different one. If you fail to adhere to that alignment, you lose a level and all the benefits you gained at that level. Your XP total doesn't change when you lose a level this way.
Comet. If you alone defeat the next low-threat or harder hostile enemy or enemies you encounter, you gain enough XP to reach the next level. Otherwise, you gain no benefit.
Donjon. You're imprisoned by a 10th-rank  ritual. This uses the prison option, typically sequestering you in a distant part of the world. You also lose all your items. Cease drawing cards.
Dullard. Immediately reduce your Intelligence score by [[/r {1d4+1} #Dullard Intelligence Decrease]]{1d4+1}. You can then draw an additional card, and the Dullard card then disappears forever.
Euryale (curse). A medusa's image curses you with a permanent -1 status penalty to all saving throws. This can be removed by only a deity or the Fates card.

The Fates. The Fates respin the fabric of reality to save you from any situation you choose. This can reverse even a past event, and you can make the decision instantly even if the event would slay you. This intervention saves only you, not anyone else affected by the event. There's no limit on how long you can wait before using this effect.

Flames. A fiend becomes filled with anger, jealousy, envy, or some other reason to despise you. Its hatred for you doesn't cease until either it or you is dead. It attacks you or otherwise attempts to foil you within [[/r 1d20 #days]]{1d20 days}. The GM determines the specifics of the fiend.
Fool. You lose [[/r 1d10*100 #XP]]{1d10*100 XP} unless you choose to draw two more cards.
Gem. Gain your choice of 25 pieces of jewelry worth 200 gp each or 50 gems worth 100 gp each.
Jester. You can either draw two more cards or gain [[/r 1d10*100 #XP]]{1d10*100 XP}. The card then disappears forever.
Key. Gain a magic weapon of 12th level or higher. The GM determines the item and what runes it has, if any.
Knight. A  arrives and swears unfailing loyalty to you.

Moon. Roll [[/r {1d4} #Wishes]]{1d4} to determine how many wishes the card grants you, which also affects the phase of the moon depicted on the card (1: crescent moon; 2: half moon; 3: gibbous moon; 4: full moon). These wishes each take one action to speak and have the effect of a  spell.
Rogue. One NPC ally becomes filled with hatred and immediately turns against you forever. The NPC might keep this hatred secret until an opportune moment.
Ruin. You lose all your nonmagical possessions, including any wealth and property.
Skull. You must immediately battle a . If slain in the battle, you can never be revived, except by a deity.
Star. Gain an ability boost you must use immediately on one ability score of your choice.
Sun. Gain 1,000 XP and a beneficial permanent magic item of 6th to 11th level, chosen by the GM.
Talons. All your magic items disappear permanently, except for the deck and any artifact of higher level than the deck.
Throne. You gain a permanent +4 status bonus to Diplomacy checks, and you now own a small castle in any open area you wish. You must choose its location within 1 hour.

Vizier. Upon request, you can learn the solution to any one problem or the correct answer to any one question, unless that information is obscured by a deity. This doesn't necessarily give you the means to act on that solution. You have 1 year to take the vizier's advice or lose its benefits.

The Void. Your mind becomes trapped forever. This card is fickle, but it often throws the psyche into a prison in an object on a distant plane or planet.  or similarly powerful magic can reveal your psyche's location, but it doesn't bring you back. Your comatose body continues to function. Cease drawing cards.

entries_en.result: Energy Unleashed (evocation) Raw energy deals ] damage per spell rank of the surge () in a .

Vitality Energy Expulsion (healing, necromancy, vitality) Vitality energy explodes outward, healing living creatures for ] Hit Points per spell rank of the surge in a . Undead creatures instead take the same amount of ]{vitality damage}, with a .

Mass Siphon (transmutation) Creatures and objects within a  become nearly weightless until the end of your next turn. Nearly weightless creatures can Climb at their land Speed and can Leap as far upward as they could normally Leap horizontally.

Magical Nemesis (conjuration, teleportation) A random creature connected to your magic (or inimical to it) appears within 60 feet. The creature should be of a level approximately equal to the level of an animal summoned by summon animal of the spell rank, although it can be of any type. The GM determines the specific creature. The creature is unfriendly to you and friendly to your apparent enemies. After 1 minute, the creature can choose either to return where it came from or to remain. It is not summoned or a minion.

Monstrous Transformation (mental, morph, transmutation) Your head and arms transform into an exaggerated imitation of a creature connected to your magic for 1 minute. The GM determines the creature. You gain a status bonus to weapon and unarmed damage rolls equal to the spell rank. At the start of each of your turns while you are transformed, you must succeed at a  or be  until the start of your next turn. On a critical success, you can choose to end the effect entirely, also losing the status bonus.

Sudden Gale (air, evocation) Weather in a  is disturbed. Strong winds blow in a random direction for 1 minute. Each creature that starts its turn in the area must succeed at a  or fall  (and be pushed 10 feet on a critical failure), and you must succeed at this save immediately after the surge. Any movement against the wind is difficult terrain, or greater difficult terrain while flying.
Tremor (earth, evocation) The earth trembles in a . Each creature on a surface must immediately succeed at a  or fall . The surface then becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute.

Oppressive Voice (divination, mental, nonlethal) The voice of your muse, your deity, an ancestor, or another appropriate entity suddenly overwhelms your mind. You must attempt a . You take |traits:nonlethal] per spell rank with a basic Will save. On a failure, you're also Stunned 1 (stunned 2 on a critical failure).

Trinket Squall (illusion) Visual illusions of objects related to your magic fall like rain throughout a  for 1 minute, giving concealment in the area. Creatures can attempt to disbelieve this illusion.
Antimagic Eruption (abjuration) The surge attempts to counteract a random spell active on you and on each creature within a .
Mental Broadcast (detection, divination, mental) For 1 minute, everyone within 30 feet of you can hear your surface thoughts.
Verdant Clutch (conjuration, plant) Plants and vines grow from all surfaces within 20 feet, causing all creatures in the area to be  unless they succeed at a . The Escape DC is equal to the spell DC.

Tinge of Terror (emotion, enchantment, fear, mental) All creatures within 20 feet are affected by powerful fright. They attempt a , becoming Frightened 1 on a failure or frightened 2 on a critical failure.

Strike up the Band (auditory, illusion) For 1 minute, you are followed by orchestral theme music tied to the emotional content of the actions you're performing. This grants you a +2 status bonus to Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Performance checks, a -2 status penalty to Deception checks, and makes certain uses of Stealth virtually impossible. It might have other effects as the GM sees fit.
Life Sap (necromancy) The surge drains your life force and strength. You become Drained 1 and Doomed 1, and you are Enfeebled 2 for 1 minute.

Ablative Barrier (abjuration) Energy forms a protective barrier that ablates slowly as creatures in the area take damage. All creatures in a  gain resistance to all damage equal to double the surge's spell rank for up to 1 minute. Whenever a creature applies this resistance, the resistance for all affected creatures reduces by 1. The effect ends for all creatures when it reduces to 0.

Luminous Pests (illusion, visual) Numerous tiny flying creatures formed of bright colorful light, such as bats or hummingbirds, emerge from you, flying in a . You and all creatures in the cone must succeed at a  or be  for 1 minute, or  for 1 round and then dazzled for 1 minute on a critical failure.

Emotional Turmoil (emotion, enchantment, mental) A swirl of conflicting emotions overwhelm you from the surging magic. For 1 minute, attempt a  at the start of each of your turns. On a success, you gain a +2 status bonus to all attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks; on a failure, you take a -2 status penalty to them instead.
Sudden Downpour (evocation, water) Water cascades from above, putting out non-magical fires in a  and attempting to counteract magical fires.

Spell Surge You immediately cast any spell in your repertoire of the surge's spell rank or lower (or from your prepared spells or innate spells if you don't have a repertoire but have been forced to generate a wellspring surge). You must choose a spell that takes 3 or fewer actions to cast.
